What We Build

OUR SERVICES

Whether it’s finishing the basement for additional space, creating your dream outdoor living area, or turning your garage into a perfectly organized hangout — we do everything the same way: Ruggedly Crafted, Beautifully Designed.

01 —
CUSTOM DECKS
Multi-level decks and outdoor living spaces built tough for Minnesota’s climate. Your dream outdoor hangout, crafted to last for decades.
Get an Estimate
02 —
BASEMENT REMODELS
Transform your unfinished basement into beautiful, livable space. Home theaters, bars, guest suites, and more — designed and built to last.
Get an Estimate
Before
After
03 —
GARAGE SOLUTIONS
Custom built-ins, storage systems, wall shelving, and full garage transformations. Turn your garage into a perfectly organized space you’ll love.

Why Choose Us

THE RUGGED
DIFFERENCE

“Ruggedly Crafted,
Beautifully Designed.”
Free Walkthroughs & Estimates
We come to your home, walk through the vision together, and give you a clear honest estimate — no pressure, no obligation.
One Team, Every Project
Decks, basement remodels, and garage solutions — one consistent, trusted crew from start to finish.
Local Minnesota Crew
We’re local, we know the climate, and we treat every home like our own. You always know exactly who is on your project.
Uncompromising Craftsmanship
Every detail matters. We don’t cut corners or rush — because your home deserves to be done right the first time.
How It Works

OUR PROCESS

01
Free Walkthrough
We visit your home at no cost, walk through your vision, assess the space, and listen to what you want to accomplish.
02
Design & Estimate
We put together a detailed, transparent estimate with clear material options. No hidden fees, no vague line items — ever.
03
Plan & Schedule
We handle permits, coordinate materials, and lock in a start date that works for you. Clear communication throughout.
04
Build & Deliver
Our crew gets to work and doesn’t leave until the job meets our standards. Final walkthrough to make sure you love it.
